'''dasate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:dianoetically|dianoetically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dianoetically|dianoetically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dasate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dasate|dasate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dasatesher|dasatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasatesherĂ«m|dasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dasatero|dasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dasateshĂ«|dasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasateshĂ«m|dasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidasatero|gokidasatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidasateshĂ«|gokidasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidasateshĂ«m|gokidasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godasankerom|godasankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godasankeshĂ«|godasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godasankeshĂ«m|godasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godasankeya|godasankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dasaterom|dasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasatemu|dasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dasateya|dasateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidasaterom|gokidasaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidasatemu|gokidasatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidasateya|gokidasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dasasate|dasasate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dasasatesher|dasasatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasasatesherĂ«m|dasasatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dasasatero|dasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dasasateshĂ«|dasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasasateshĂ«m|dasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidasasatero|gokidasasatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidasasateshĂ«|gokidasasateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidasasateshĂ«m|gokidasasateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godasasankerom|godasasankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godasasankeshĂ«|godasasankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godasasankeshĂ«m|godasasankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godasasankeya|godasasankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dasasaterom|dasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dasasatemu|dasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dasasateya|dasasateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidasasaterom|gokidasasaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidasasatemu|gokidasasatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidasasateya|gokidasasateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠte|dĂŠsĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠtesher|dĂŠsĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠsĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠtero|dĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠtero|gokidĂŠsĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠsĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠsĂŠnkerom|godĂŠsĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠsĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠsĂŠnkeya|godĂŠsĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠterom|dĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠtemu|dĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠsĂŠteya|dĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠterom|gokidĂŠsĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠsĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠsĂŠteya|gokidĂŠsĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafsafte|dafsafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafsaftesher|dafsaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafsaftesherĂ«m|dafsaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafsaftero|dafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafsafteshĂ«|dafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafsafteshĂ«m|dafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafsaftero|gokidafsaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafsafteshĂ«|gokidafsafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafsafteshĂ«m|gokidafsafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafsafnkerom|godafsafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafsafnkeshĂ«|godafsafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafsafnkeshĂ«m|godafsafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafsafnkeya|godafsafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafsafterom|dafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafsaftemu|dafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafsafteya|dafsafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafsafterom|gokidafsafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafsaftemu|gokidafsaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafsafteya|gokidafsafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
